description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a long barrel. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and iron sights mounted along the top. The wooden components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The front of the barrel is fitted with a slotted flash hider, and the trigger, magazine release, and safety lever are all visible. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with ergonomic elements for handling and operation.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, curved magazine, and black metal receiver, featuring iron sights and a slotted flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and safety lever, with clear visibility of the wooden and metal components.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel, front sight, and muzzle device, with the stock and magazine mostly obscured.
